option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
langchain4j: open-ai: chat-model: base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 api-key: ${API-KEY} model-name: qwen-plus-2025-09-11 log-requests: true log-responses: true streaming-chat-model: base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 api-key: ${API-KEY} model-name: qwen-plus-2025-09-11 log-requests: true log-responses: true embedding-model: base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 api-key: ${API-KEY} model-name: text-embedding-v4 log-requests: true log-responses: true max-segments-per-batch: 10 # 最大批量处理数量 (text-embedding-v4最大是10) 这里设置10 即每次处理10个,分多次 #langchain4j 的向量数据库的配置 (基于Milvus) community: milvus: host: localhost port: 19530 collection-name: embedding_collection dimension: 1024
logging: level: dev.langchain4j: debug
server: port: 8087
# 上下文记忆的配置(redis) spring: application: name: ai-service data: redis: host: localhost port: 6379 password: root database: 5 datasource: url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/langchain4j?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&serverTimezone=UTC username: root password: 1234 driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver cloud: nacos: server-addr: 192.168.88.131:8848 discovery: namespace: hmall enabled: false # Disable Nacos discovery for local development mybatis: configuration: map-underscore-to-camel-case: true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
langchain4j: open-ai: chat-model: base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 api-key: ${API-KEY} model-name: qwen-plus-2025-09-11 log-requests: true log-responses: true streaming-chat-model: base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 api-key: ${API-KEY} model-name: qwen-plus-2025-09-11 log-requests: true log-responses: true embedding-model: base-url: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 api-key: ${API-KEY} model-name: text-embedding-v4 log-requests: true log-responses: true max-segments-per-batch: 10 # 最大批量处理数量 (text-embedding-v4最大是10) 这里设置10 即每次处理10个,分多次 #langchain4j 的向量数据库的配置 (基于Milvus) community: milvus: host: localhost port: 19530 collection-name: embedding_collection dimension: 1024
logging: level: dev.langchain4j: debug
server: port: 8087 error: include-message: always include-binding-errors: always include-stacktrace: on_param
# 上下文记忆的配置(redis) spring: application: name: ai-service data: redis: host: localhost port: 6379 password: root database: 5 datasource: url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/langchain4j?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8&serverTimezone=UTC username: root password: 1234 driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver cloud: nacos: server-addr: 192.168.88.131:8848 discovery: namespace: hmall enabled: false # Disable Nacos discovery for local development mybatis: configuration: map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
